description_long: This is a fantasy-inspired battle axe featuring a double-edged blade with jagged, horn-like protrusions along the outer edges. The blade is predominantly dark green with a gradient to a pale, almost glowing green, and is accented by wooden, spike-like extensions that give it a menacing appearance. The handle is wrapped in green material, likely leather or cloth, and is capped at both ends with pointed, wood-textured tips. The axe head is robust and thick, with a reinforced central section where the blade meets the handle, suggesting durability and strength. The overall design is highly stylized, with exaggerated, organic curves and a slightly asymmetrical blade profile. This object would stand out in an urban context as a decorative or fantasy-themed tool, rather than a practical implement.
description: A stylized, double-edged battle axe with jagged green blades and wooden spike accents, featuring a wrapped handle and pointed tips. The design is fantasy-inspired and visually striking.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the side, showcasing the full double-edged blade with five prominent wooden spikes and a green, wrapped handle.
description_view_1: A narrow, edge-on view reveals the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the pointed tips at both ends visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the axe, displaying the blade's jagged edges and spikes, with the green and pale gradient more pronounced.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the slimness of the axe and the alignment of the spikes.
attribute_handle_type: Short, straight handle with a round cross-section, wrapped in green material for grip, capped with pointed wooden tips.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged, asymmetrical blade with jagged, horn-like wooden spikes and a thick, reinforced central section; blade has a fantasy, organic shape.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible integration of blade and handle.
